models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255))
    balance = Column(Decimal)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Customer model to store customer information including balance and credit limit.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'))
    amount_total = Column(Decimal)
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    notes = Column(String(255))
models.description: Order model containing details of orders including customer relationships and notes.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
    amount = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Item model for items within orders having relationships to orders and products.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255))
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Product model storing product information including price.
models.name: Product

rules.name: Ensure_Customer_Balance_Less_Than_Credit_Limit
rules.description: Enforces that a Customer's balance is less than their credit limit.
rules.code:
Rule.constraint(validate=Customer,
                as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit,
                error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: Calculate_Customer_Balance
rules.description: Derive the Customer's balance as the sum of Order amount_total where date_shipped is null.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Calculate_Order_Amount_Total
rules.description: Derive the Order's amount_total as the sum of Item amount.

rules.name: Calculate_Item_Amount
rules.description: Derive the Item amount based on quantity and unit_price.

rules.name: Copy_Item_Unit_Price
rules.description: Copies the Item's unit_price from Product's unit_price.

rules.name: Order_to_Kafka_Integration
rules.description: Send the Order to Kafka topic 'order_shipping' if the date_shipped is not None.
rules.code:
Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka,
               if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None,
               with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})

customer4 = Customer(id=4, name="David", balance=0, credit_limit=1500)

product4 = Product(id=4, name="Contraption", unit_price=25.0)

order2 = Order(id=2, customer_id=2, amount_total=0, date_shipped=None, notes="Follow-up order")
